mapper.insert:
insert into ter_alert
id, ter_sn, sensor_type, data, created_time, deal_flag, del_flag,
#{id}, #{terSn}, #{sensorType}, #{data}, #{createdTime}, #{delFlag}, #{dealFlag},
mapper.update:
update ter_alert set deal_flag = '1',deal_time = now() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select t.* from (select ta.id, ta.ter_sn, ta.sensor_type, ta.created_time, ta.created_time as created_time_date, ta.created_time as created_time_time, ta.del_flag, ta.deal_flag, ta.deal_time, ta.data, bpi.building_id, bi.name as building_name, bpi.floor_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bfi.floor_name, bfi.background_img_id, bfi.floor_length, bfi.floor_width from ter_alert ta LEFT JOIN ter_info ti on (ta.ter_sn = ti.sn) LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag='0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) left join building_info bi on(bfi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on(ti.gateway = tg.sn) inner join sys_dept d on(bi.dept_id=d.dept_id) where 1=1
${params.dataScope} and ta.ter_sn = #{terSn} and ta.deal_flag = #{dealFlag} and ta.sensor_type = #{sensorType} and bpi.building_id = #{buildingId} and bpi.floor_id = #{floorId} and bpi.block = #{block} and bpi.zone = #{zone} and bpi.zone_sub = #{zoneSub} and DATE_FORMAT(ta.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(ta.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(ta.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') <= STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and ta.sensor_type in
#{sensorType}
order by
CASE WHEN ta.sensor_type=#{checkSensorType} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
ta.deal_flag asc, ta.created_time desc) t

select ta.sensor_type, count(1) as count from ter_alert ta left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ta.ter_sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id) where ta.deal_flag = '0'
and ta.sensor_type in
#{sensorType}
${params.dataScope} group by ta.sensor_type

select ta.id, ta.ter_sn, ta.sensor_type, ta.created_time, ta.del_flag, ta.deal_flag, ta.deal_time, ta.data, bpi.building_id, bi.name as building_name, bpi.floor_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bfi.floor_name from ter_alert ta LEFT JOIN ter_info ti on (ta.ter_sn = ti.sn) LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag='0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) left join building_info bi on(bfi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on(ti.gateway = tg.sn) inner join sys_dept d on(bi.dept_id=d.dept_id) where 1=1 and ta.id= #{id} and ta.ter_sn = #{terSn} and ta.deal_flag = #{dealFlag} and ta.sensor_type = #{sensorType} and bpi.building_id = #{buildingId} and bpi.floor_id = #{floorId} and DATE_FORMAT(ta.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by ta.deal_flag asc, ta.created_time desc
